title: {YTP} ~ Smash Bros. Alternate (Collab Entry)
description:
Entry for Schaffrillas Productions' Super Smash Bros. YTP Collab, which can be found here: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=uNbiAxYtr50 Please check it out! Lots of underrated editors participated :)

Entries were intended to be under 2 minutes, so this standalone version includes content that was cut or added later.
